metadata.name: gois1
metadata.summary: A package for GOIS-based inference, evaluation, and preprocessing

functions.name: my_package.evaluation_upscaling.get_evaluation_metrics
documentation:
Evaluate predictions using COCO metrics.

Args:
    ground_truth_path (str): Path to the ground truth COCO JSON file.
    predictions_path (str): Path to the predictions COCO JSON file.

Returns:
    dict: Evaluation metrics (AP and AR values).

functions.name: my_package.evaluation_upscaling.evaluate_and_generate_upscaling_results
documentation:
Evaluate Full Inference and GOIS Inference and apply upscaling.

Args:
    ground_truth_path (str): Path to the ground truth COCO JSON file.
    full_inference_path (str): Path to the Full Inference JSON file.
    gois_inference_path (str): Path to the GOIS Inference JSON file.

Returns:
    tuple: Original results DataFrame, upscaled results DataFrame

functions.name: my_package.models.model_utils.load_model_config
documentation: Dummy function to load a model configuration.

functions.name: my_package.evaluation.evaluate_predictions
documentation:
Evaluate predictions using COCO metrics.

Args:
    ground_truth_path (str): Path to the ground truth COCO JSON file.
    predictions_path (str): Path to the predictions COCO JSON file.
    iou_type (str): Type of evaluation (default is 'bbox').

Returns:
    None: Displays evaluation metrics on the console.

functions.name: my_package.data_processing.image_loader.load_image
documentation: Dummy function to load an image.

functions.name: my_package.fix_prediction.fix_predictions_format
documentation: Ensure the predictions file is a flat array of objects.

functions.name: my_package.gois_inference.draw_detections_on_image
documentation: Draw predictions on the original image.

functions.name: my_package.gois_inference.perform_sliced_inference
documentation: Perform YOLO inference on sliced images and save predictions in COCO format and annotated images.

functions.name: my_package.preprocessing.custom_to_coco
documentation:
Convert custom annotation format to COCO format.

Args:
    images_folder (str): Path to the folder containing image files.
    annotations_folder (str): Path to the folder containing annotation files.

Returns:
    dict: COCO-formatted dictionary.

functions.name: my_package.preprocessing.save_coco_format
documentation:
Save the COCO-formatted data to a JSON file.

Args:
    coco_data (dict): COCO-formatted data.
    output_path (str): Path to save the JSON file.

functions.name: my_package.inference.perform_inference
documentation: Perform inference and save predictions and annotated images.
